# Starter / Preconstructed Decks
# Format:
#   [Deck Name]
#   3 SERIAL
#   2 SERIAL
#   (blank line between decks)
#
# Quantities are capped at the normal per-card limit on import.
# LB cards are detected automatically by the database.
# Prefix the name with * to exclude the deck: [*Name] — use when cards are missing from the API.
